title: Sanji Returns to Luffy
description: On pages 12–15, this part focuses on Caesar Clown, Luffy, Big Mom as Sanji chooses to return to Luffy, and the assassination plot against Big Mom begins taking shape.
scene: Sanji and Luffy reunite emotionally, turning the rescue mission into a direct conspiracy against Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well well well, what a nice bath that was-yoho

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Paradise- Paradise-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: But I'm not going there yet!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This feels like after a battle... I'm getting too relaxed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The Battle hasn't even started yet!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: AH! A fridge!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: There's milk in here, milk!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't go through the fridge in someone else's house so casually!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, I am so glad you had a great time.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What great timing. I'm missing a tooth, so...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: me too, my face has been cracked, so...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Aaaahhh.... I'm healed.....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the hell is wrong with your bodies!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: unfor- giveable!! Chiffon!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I can't believe you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: time until the start of the "TEA party": 3 hours and 30 minutes...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to think that you'd help the man who plans to kill mama!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Please think this through, Chiffon-Sama!! Assassinating Mama...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: brulee! You know what Mama did to me, don't you!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That's absolutely impossible !!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lola is in danger too. My family is BEEP and Pez!! That's enough for me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Good, everyone's gathered...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did you manage to get at least some filth off you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: As they say, "Clothes make the person".

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't waste my breath with anyone who can't even keep a tidy appearance.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Now I am a

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: There's three and a half hours left..

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: First we decide...if we're going to join forces or not!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For us, you lot are just a pain in the ass.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The easiest way out is to eliminate you right now...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you kill me, your chances of assessing big mom are zero.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Since the ceremony itself will be cancelled.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They'll become suspicious if I don't return 2 hours before the banquet starts.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Hah... a real shame, but that's true.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'll have to leave you alive.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: This is no time for threats.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy, what do your instincts tell you? Can you join them or not?

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: You bastard! You're Caesar, aren't you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: gyaaah !!!

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: Eeh!? Caesar? Where??

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: No,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Seriously, now?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: He's been here this whole time...

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: Caesar clown!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Uwooh!! Ha...ha

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm working!! I'm working properly!! Report that to big mom!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I asked to switch guard duty to me

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: And they did, without a word.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Right now, I am a trustworthy "ROOK"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I'll let you escape

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: If you lend me your power...

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Sanji Returns storyline with 51 dialogue beats. Sanji chooses to return to Luffy, and the crew joins Bege’s risky plan to attack Big Mom during the tea party.
